summary:
Yes — the wiki lint is complete. Here's what was fixed:

**Pass 1 — Structural Integrity**
- Verified all 143 pages match index.md entries. No broken wikilinks, no orphan pages, no duplicate pages.

**Pass 2 — Wrong & Duplicate Information**
- Fixed frontmatter on `timelines/2026-03.md` and `timelines/2026-04.md`: `slug` → `month` per WIKI.md schema.
- Added missing `## Overview` to `topics/ai_funding.md` (the only topic without one).
- Merged duplicate annotated connection lines across 6 files.
- Updated `last_updated` to 2026-05-08 on all 13 files modified during lint.

**Pass 3 — Connection Quality**
- Removed 11 raw-text lines from `## Connections` sections across 9 files.
- Merged duplicate wikilinks in Connections (`gpt-5.5`, `mistral-medium-3-5`, `andrej-karpathy-skills`, `military-ai-divide`, `sources/anthropic`).
- Added missing `[[sources/openai]]` to `topics/agentic_ai.md` Connections.
- All topic pages confirmed to have required sections.

**Pass 4 — Index & Log**
- `wiki/index.md` last updated bumped to 2026-05-08.
- `wiki/log.md` appended with full lint entry documenting the fixes.
